task: Add a GET /health endpoint that returns { status: 'ok' }

entries.message:
STDOUT: Implemented the endpoint and added a test with minimal changes.

### Changes made
- Added `GET /health` in [index.js](/workspace/index.js) returning JSON `{ status: "ok" }`.
- Added a test in [index.test.js](/workspace/index.test.js) that:
  - starts the app on an ephemeral port,
  - calls `GET /health`,
  - asserts `200` and `{ status: "ok" }`.

### Validation
All requested checks passed:
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`
- `npm run build`

Note: in this repo, `npm test` currently runs `echo ok`, so the new test file is present but not executed by the current test script.
